name: Premier
description_short: Premier Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving central Iowa with checking, savings, loans, and wealth management services.
description_long:
Premier Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving Des Moines, Ames, and central Iowa communities. The credit union is federally insured through NCUA and maintains physical branch locations including a newly opened Ankany branch offering full-service banking capabilities.

Premier offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including high-yield checking accounts (up to 6.00% APY), savings accounts, youth accounts, certificates of deposit (up to 4.00% APY), auto loans (APR as low as 4.99%), home loans, HELOCs (home equity lines of credit), personal loans, and wealth management services. They also provide mortgage rate relief programs through partnership with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines, offering eligible homebuyers rates up to 1.5% below current market rates. Members can access services via mobile app, online banking, and physical branches.

Premier distinguishes itself through competitive promotional rates, local decision-making, member referral rewards programs, dedicated wealth management services with specialized advisors, and community-focused initiatives like educational resources for young savers and college preparation tools. The credit union emphasizes personalized service and locally-based support.

As a credit union, Premier operates on a member-benefit model rather than shareholder profit maximization. The organization appears well-established with multiple locations and service expansions. However, detailed fee schedules and complete product terms are not fully accessible through available website content due to technical blocks on their rates and fees page.
services: Premier Checking accounts with promotional APY rates
pros: High-yield checking account offering 6.00% APY with debit card usage requirements
Competitive CD rates up to 4.00% APY
Auto loan rates as low as 4.99% APR
Mortgage rate relief program offering up to 1.5% below market rates for eligible buyers
Home equity line of credit (HELOC) with flexible fund access
HELOC can be used for home projects, debt consolidation, or major expenses
Dedicated wealth management services with specialized Trust Officer and Advisor
Member referral reward program incentivizing customer acquisition
Multiple physical branch locations plus mobile app banking
Youth accounts and educational resources for young savers
cons: Full rate and fee schedules not accessible on website (Cloudflare blocks detailed pricing pages)
Geographic limitation to central Iowa region reduces accessibility for out-of-area members
HELOC and some loan products require home equity or collateral, limiting options for renters
Promotional rates like 6.00% checking APY may have income requirements, transaction minimums, or membership tier restrictions not fully disclosed in available content
best_for: Central Iowa residents seeking competitive rates on checking, savings, and auto loans
Homeowners interested in HELOCs or mortgage refinancing with local relationship banking
Members prioritizing credit union membership benefits and community-focused lending
Families looking for youth accounts and financial education resources
diagnosis: Premier Credit Union is best for central Iowa residents and homeowners seeking competitive rates on deposit accounts, auto loans, and mortgages with personalized, local service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to central Iowa and dependence on collateral/home equity for some premium loan products; prospective members should confirm the specific requirements and restrictions on advertised promotional rates (6.00% checking, mortgage relief programs) before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
